description_long: This house is situated on a sloped, grassy terrain and features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof. The structure is primarily composed of dark brown and gray materials, likely wood and concrete, with large, rectangular windows on the front and sides. The house is elevated above the ground, with a series of steps or a platform leading up to the main entrance. A paved driveway or road curves up to the house, integrating it into the surrounding landscape. The terrain around the house is gently undulating, and the house appears to be positioned to take advantage of the elevated view. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and contemporary, with an emphasis on geometric forms and integration with the natural environment.
description: A modern, boxy house with a flat roof, large windows, and dark exterior, set on a sloped grassy terrain with a curved driveway. The design is minimalist and contemporary, blending with the landscape.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main facade, large windows, and the driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the slope of the terrain and the house's elevated position.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the house, less window detail, and the terrain's incline.
description_view_3: Front-right view focusing on the entry steps/platform and the main entrance area.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway accessed by steps or a platform, with a simple door and minimal overhang, no porch or decorative columns.
